message:
feat: add FrankenSuite branding, expand featured sites, and refresh star counts

Introduce the FrankenSuite as a named product line (clean-room Rust
reimplementations of SQLite, Redis, NumPy, SciPy, PyTorch, and more) across
the site description, hero body copy, and a new "FrankenSuite" filter tab on
the projects page (using the Puzzle icon).

Expand featured sites from 4 to 8 entries, adding Jeffreys-Skills.md,
MCPAgentMail.com, FrankenTUI.com, FrankenSQLite.com, and ASupersync.com, each
with a dedicated gradient, icon, and tagline. Reorder so Agent-Flywheel leads.
Add five new Lucide icons (BookOpen, Mail, Terminal, Database, Zap) to the
featured-sites icon map, and whitelist the five new domains in the OG-image
route's ALLOWED_DOMAINS list.

Update all public-facing star counts and repo totals throughout: headline stats
move from 16K+/90+ to 20K+/170+ repos, and per-project badges and
tldr-tool-stars.json are refreshed with current values (notable jumps: DCG
349→721, ACFS 1006→1315, NTM 133→207, MCP Agent Mail 1654→1836, Beads Viewer
1211→1413, CASS 446→618).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
